channel.title: Very Important People
channel.description: Latest releases from Very Important People on Dropout.tv

item.title: Last Looks: Dash Highland
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Zac Oyama became Dash Highland.

Duration: 04:58

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, zac oyama, tamar levine, alex perrone, bruce spaulding fuller, paul robalino, behind the scenes

item.title: Dash Highland
item.description:
Vic interviews filmmaker Dash Highland (Zac Oyama) and discusses his newest project.

Duration: 18:00

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, zac oyama

item.title: Last Looks: Paloma
item.description:
The crew of Very Important People discuss how Laci Mosley became Paloma.

Duration: 04:38

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, laci mosley, tamar levine, alex perrone, alisha silverstein, behind the scenes

item.title: Paloma
item.description:
Vic interviews poodle socialite Paloma (Laci Mosley) and discusses how she came into fortune.

Duration: 12:50

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, laci mosley
